signals.headline: Ceasefire Negotiations Already Faltering | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ceasefire Negotiations Already Faltering | YES | HIGH confidence**

Weekend talks in Islamabad ended without a deal, and both sides are now discussing a second round of negotiations before the ceasefire expires next week.[3] Trump announced a U.S. Navy blockade of Iranian ports on Sunday following the failed negotiations.[4]

signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation at 2.2% YoY | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in prior months, below market forecasts of 2.4%, as reported by Statistics Korea via Trading Economics[1].
